## Self Study Resources

- Cordero Core, [*How We Got Here*](https://medium.com/@corderocore) — the 25-part history of GenAI this talk is based on (Medium, weekly)
- 3Blue1Brown, Language Models Explained:
  - Chapters [4](https://youtu.be/LPZh9BOjkQs?si=AXb6kvl44CQqaCto), [5](https://youtu.be/wjZofJX0v4M?si=-gx_cV-et1yG3aFn), [6](https://youtu.be/eMlx5fFNoYc?si=V8gU3iIsRmNMMIsM), [7](https://youtu.be/eMlx5fFNoYc?si=x01rnOt7jnsku_pa)
- Meridian Cambridge [Transformer architecture](https://youtu.be/G51Hrmfll9s?si=UQCDHBVmESqHSpbR), [Agents](https://youtu.be/8mRG0JtxLL0?si=GigTan8Hw9TEeEe0) 

::: {.notes}

:::

## Further Reading
Foundational concepts and Transformers

- 3Blue1Brown: [Neural Networks playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZHQObOWTQDNU6R1_67000Dx_ZCJB-3pi) [@3blue1brown_nn]
- Andrej Karpathy: [Neural Networks: Zero to Hero](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLAqhIrjkxbuWI23v9cThsA9GvCAUhRvKZ) [@karpathy_zero_to_hero]

- Stanford CS25: [Transformers United](https://web.stanford.edu/class/cs25/) [@stanford_cs25]
- DeepLearning.AI: [Build and Train an LLM with JAX](https://learn.deeplearning.ai/courses/build-and-train-an-llm-with-jax/lesson/gy364z/introduction) [@deeplearningai_llm_jax]

## Further Reading
Reinforcement Learning & Alignment

- Hugging Face: [Deep RL Course](https://huggingface.co/learn/deep-rl-course) [@huggingface_deep_rl]
- OpenAI: [Spinning Up in Deep RL](https://spinningup.openai.com) [@openai_spinningup]
